form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. At the latest first-up run 7th (Fr2) over 1730m at this track, beaten 19 m by Patriarch (2:03.80) in 2yo No NR on November 21 at $20. Will be better for this run and happy to watch this time.

form.formComment: Three-year-old filly lining up for the second time. Won at debut when a big 6 m win after showing early speed, (Fr1) at this track (2:36.10) beating My Machane in 2yo MAIDEN on December 16 at $8.50 at the bell was 2nd-5.4m on the pegs. Should go well while fresh.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 8th (Fr3) over 1730m at this track beaten 25 m by Miss Leopatra (2:04.00) in 3yo No NR F on March 27 at $7.50. At the run before 4th (Sr5) over 1684m at Pinjarra beaten 1.5 m by Trixie Dora (2:01.70) in 3yo 0-2 WINs F on March 9 at $10. Certainly worth another chance.

form.formComment: Last start was well back in the run when 10th (Fr6) over 2130m at this track beaten 24 m by Typhoon Treasure (2:34.20) in 3yo 1-3 WINs on March 17 at $15. form.formComment: Returns from the paddock. Previously first up won by 5.5 m as favourite after showing early speed, (Fr4) at Pinjarra (2:02.80) beating Crown General in 2yo MAIDEN on June 16 at $2.40. Well-placed for this return and is sure to measure up.

form.formComment: Having his second run back from a spell. Good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 2130m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 7 m by Im Stealthy (2:35.70) in 3yo No NR on March 13 at $31. Can play a big role.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Having his second run back from a spell. Good run when 2nd (Fr5) over 2130m after showing early speed at this track, beaten 7 m by Im Stealthy (2:35.70) in 3yo No NR on March 13 at $31. Can play a big role.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait in the front straight to receive the bell.

form.formComment: Last start solid effort despite getting well back, when 2nd (Fr8) over 2130m after racing wide at this track, beaten 2.5 m by Maternal Dreams (2:36.10) in 3yo 1-3 WINs on March 24 at $3.90. Two runs back posted a big 4 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Northam (2:39.20) beating Sovereign Jewel in 3yo 2-4 WINs on March 10 at $1.80. Right in the calculations.

form.formComment: Backs up 4 days after failing to impress last start; was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr7) over 2130m at this track beaten 10 m by Trixie Dora (2:32.50) in 3yo No NR on April 3 at $126. Showed ability the race before when he won by a nose as favourite when quickly away, (Fr4) at Wagin (2:49.40) beating Koh I Noor Camel in 3yo NR up to 49 on March 27 at $1.50. Sure to go well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Inconvenienced and raced roughly as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Fr4) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 18 m by Pet Shop Adda (2:43.80) in 3yo 0-2 WINs on April 2 at $61. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at Wagin on March 27. Not keen.

Began to give ground from the vicinity of the 400m.

form.formComment: Resuming after six-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind D Mac at this track over 2130m in a 2yo G1 No NR on September 26 at $151. A big run would not surprise.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Resuming after six-and-a-half months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into seventh behind D Mac at this track over 2130m in a 2yo G1 No NR on September 26 at $151. A big run would not surprise.

form.formComment: Second-up here following a spell. Good run despite getting well back, when 3rd (Fr6) over 2130m after racing wide at this track, beaten 15 m by Maternal Dreams (2:36.10) in 3yo 1-3 WINs on March 24 at $1.70. Very hard to beat.
